**⚠️ DO NOT POST SENSITIVE VULNERABILITIES PUBLICLY ⚠️**

Please read our [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md) before submitting. 

If this is a critical zero-day or a vulnerability that could be exploited (e.g. bypassing Workspace Isolation), please email divyansh9704@github.com instead of opening this issue.

If this is a minor security enhancement request or a general security question, proceed below.

**Describe the security concern**
A clear and concise description of the security issue.
